top_signals.title: TotalEnergies Offers Iraqi Oil to Asian Buyers as Supply Swells
top_signals.summary: French oil major TotalEnergies SE is offering millions of barrels of Iraqi crude that can be promptly delivered to Asia, according to traders, adding to a market already brimming with supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
